moments.author: Elon Musk
moments.why: A blunt, high‑impact announcement marking Tesla's official launch in Uruguay, sparking excitement among fans and EV watchers

moments.author: SpaceX (retweeted by Elon Musk)
moments.quote: Falcon and Starship taking off almost same day (~2h apart) — SpaceX does years in a day
moments.why: A jaw‑dropping milestone in space launch cadence, showcasing SpaceX’s rapid pace and Elon Musk’s amplification makes it trend hard

moments.author: Tesla Latinoamérica
moments.why: The localized “Hola Uruguay” post from Tesla stirred national pride and anticipation, going viral in the region

moments.author: Elon Musk
moments.quote: Love the new Starship Schematics T‑shirt sold by SpaceX
moments.why: A casual but enthusiast‑fanned shout‑out that collided fandom, merch hype, and Musk’s amplifying attention
